/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/timestorm_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/timestorm_tests.dir/test_timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/timestorm_tests.dir/home/runner/work/timestorm/timestorm/timestorm/timer.cpp.o -o timestorm_tests  _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Main.a _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a
